title: Sneak Fertilizing
description: Applies bonemeal effect to crops and saplings when sneaking.
body:
This mod allows you to fertilize saplings and crops using the “shift” key. The effect has no time limit between presses.
  
  Fertilizer radius of action - 5 blocks.
  
  This mod is inspired by an old mod that was in the stoneblock modpack. I couldn't find the same one for newer versions, so I decided to make one myself.
  
  Supports most fertilized seedlings, crops, and other fertilizable.
  Also work with modded fertilizable that use vanilla fertilization mechanic.
